data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

Respondents were asked how often in the past 30 days they felt restless. Respondents could choose from among five response categories: "All of the time," "Most of the time," "Some of the time," "A little of the time," or "None of the time." "All" and "Most" are combined.
